mapper.select: SELECT dock_people AS people, write_time AS TIME, dock_department AS department, dock_phone AS phone FROM `audit_elements_operation_steps` WHERE delete_status = '1' AND information_type like CONCAT('%', #{informationType}, '%') AND audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')

SELECT DISTINCT "primary_business_process" AS `lable`, `primary_business_process` AS `value` FROM audit_elements_business_process where "primary_business_process" is not null and "primary_business_process" !=''
SELECT `prvd_code` AS prvdCode FROM `audit_code_rule` WHERE `prvd_bus` like CONCAT('%', #{busiUnitCode}, '%') LIMIT 1

SELECT a.`busiUnitCode` FROM hpmgr.`bonc_union_userinfos` a LEFT JOIN hpmgr.`bonc_cmwa_prvd` b ON a.`busiUnitCode` = b.org_code WHERE a.userName like CONCAT('%', #{dockPeople}, '%')
AND like CONCAT('%', #{dockDepartment}, '%') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(b.`org_name`, '公司', '') || '%'
LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT "secondary_business_process" AS `lable`, `secondary_business_process` AS `value` FROM audit_elements_business_process where "secondary_business_process" IS NOT NULL AND `secondary_business_process`!=''
and "primary_business_process" like CONCAT('%', #{business1}, '%')

SELECT DISTINCT "secondary_business_process_id" AS `id` FROM audit_elements_business_process WHERE `secondary_business_process` like CONCAT('%', #{business2}, '%') and "primary_business_process" like CONCAT('%', #{business1}, '%')

SELECT COUNT(audit_point_number) AS auditpointcount FROM `audit_elements_info` WHERE secondary_business_process like CONCAT('%', #{business2}, '%') AND audit_point_number LIKE '%' || like CONCAT('%', #{depmCode}, '%') || '%'

SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(SUBSTR(audit_model_number, - 3)) IS NULL THEN '1' ELSE MAX(SUBSTR(audit_model_number, - 3)) + 1 END FROM `audit_elements_info` WHERE audit_point_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNumber}, '%')

SELECT audit_point_number FROM `audit_elements_info` WHERE primary_business_process like CONCAT('%', #{primaryBusinessProcess}, '%') AND secondary_business_process like CONCAT('%', #{secondaryBusinessProcess}, '%') AND audit_point_name like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%') AND audit_point_number LIKE '%' || like CONCAT('%', #{depmCode}, '%') || '%' LIMIT 1
SELECT audit_model_number FROM `audit_elements_info` WHERE audit_model_name like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelName}, '%') AND `audit_point_number` like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNumber}, '%')
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `audit_elements_system`
audit_model_number, code_requirement, file_name, specification_requirement, reference_number, dispatch_time, start_time, end_time, standard_basis,
like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{codeRequirement}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{fileName}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{specificationRequirement}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{referenceNumber}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{dispatchTime}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{startTime}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{endTime}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{standardBasis}, '%'),

INSERT INTO `audit_elements_system` ( audit_model_number, code_requirement, file_name, specification_requirement, reference_number, dispatch_time, start_time, end_time, standard_basis ) VALUES
( like CONCAT('%', #{emp.auditModelNumber}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{emp.codeRequirement}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{emp.fileName}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{emp.specificationRequirement}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{emp.referenceNumber}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{emp.dispatchTime}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{emp.startTime}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{emp.endTime}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{emp.standardBasis}, '%') )
mapper.update: UPDATE `audit_elements_system` SET code_requirement like CONCAT('%', #{codeRequirement}, '%'), file_name like CONCAT('%', #{fileName}, '%'), specification_requirement like CONCAT('%', #{specificationRequirement}, '%'), reference_number like CONCAT('%', #{referenceNumber}, '%'), dispatch_time like CONCAT('%', #{dispatchTime}, '%'), start_time like CONCAT('%', #{startTime}, '%'), end_time like CONCAT('%', #{endTime}, '%') WHERE audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') AND delete_status = '1'
UPDATE `audit_elements_system` SET delete_status = '0' WHERE audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') AND delete_status = '1'

UPDATE `audit_elements_info` SET audit_business_logic=NULL, expected_risks =NULL, expected_data_requirements=NULL, expected_data_covers_unit_demand=NULL, requirements_involve_the_system=NULL WHERE audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.select: SELECT a.`audit_point_number`, a.`audit_point_name`, a.`audit_model_number`, a.`audit_model_name`, a.`primary_business_process`, a.`secondary_business_process`, a.`audit_business_logic`, a.`execution_logic`, a.`expected_risks`, a.`expected_data_requirements`, a.`expected_data_covers_unit_demand`, a.`requirements_involve_the_system`, a.`is_online`, COALESCE(b.`model_owner`, b.`dock_people`) AS `model_owner`, COALESCE( b.`model_owner_depy`, b.`dock_deputy` ) AS `model_owner_depy` FROM `hpeapm`.`audit_elements_info` a LEFT JOIN `hpeapm`.`spl_model_type` b ON a.`audit_model_number` = b.`audit_model_number` WHERE a.`audit_model_number` like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
SELECT * FROM audit_elements_system WHERE `audit_model_number` like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') AND `delete_status` = '1'

select * from ( SELECT _abc.*, _def.code_requirement AS code_requirement, _def.file_name AS file_name, _def.specification_requirement AS specification_requirement, _def.reference_number AS reference_number, _def.dispatch_time AS dispatch_time, _def.start_time AS start_time, _def.end_time AS end_time, _def.standard_basis AS standardBasis FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.dockPeople as dock_people, a.auditPointNumber audit_point_number, a.auditPointName audit_point_name, a.auditModelNumber audit_model_number, a.auditModelName audit_model_name, a.typeOfInformation type_of_information, a.detailed_time detailed_time, a.dockDepartment dock_department, b.primaryBusinessProcess primary_business_process, b.secondaryBusinessProcess secondary_business_process, b.auditBusinessLogic audit_business_logic, b.executionLogic execution_logic, b.expectedRisks expected_risks, b.expectedDataRequirements expected_data_requirements, b.expectedDataCoversUnitDemand expected_data_covers_unit_demand, b.requirementsInvolveTheSystem requirements_involve_the_system, b.isOnline as is_online, b.isSyn as is_syn, b.synUrl as syn_url, b.modelOwner FROM (SELECT a.`audit_point_number` AS auditPointNumber, a.`audit_point_name` AS auditPointName, a.`audit_model_number` AS auditModelNumber, a.`audit_model_name` AS auditModelName, a.`dock_people` AS dockPeople, a.type_of_information typeOfInformation, a.dock_department dockDepartment, a.detailed_time detailed_time FROM `audit_elements_operation_steps` a WHERE a.information_type = '审计模型设计' AND a.delete_status = '1' AND a.`is_import` like CONCAT('%', #{isImport}, '%') AND a.`dock_people` like CONCAT('%', #{dockPeople}, '%') AND a.`dock_department` LIKE like CONCAT('%', #{dockDepartment}, '%')
AND a.`audit_point_name` like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%')
AND a.`audit_point_number` LIKE '%' || like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNumber}, '%') || '%'
AND a.`audit_model_number` LIKE '%' || like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') || '%'
AND a.`audit_model_name` like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelName}, '%')
) a JOIN (SELECT b.`audit_model_number` AS auditModelNumber, b.`primary_business_process` AS primaryBusinessProcess, b.`secondary_business_process` AS secondaryBusinessProcess, b.`audit_business_logic` AS auditBusinessLogic, b.`expected_risks` AS expectedRisks, b.`execution_logic` AS executionLogic, b.`expected_data_requirements` AS expectedDataRequirements, b.expected_data_covers_unit_demand AS expectedDataCoversUnitDemand, b.requirements_involve_the_system AS requirementsInvolveTheSystem, b.is_online AS isOnline, b.is_syn AS isSyn, b.syn_url AS synUrl, c.`model_owner` as modelOwner FROM `audit_elements_info` b LEFT JOIN `spl_model_type` c ON b.`audit_model_number`=c.`audit_model_number` WHERE 1=1
and b.offline!='1'
AND b.`primary_business_process` = like CONCAT('%', #{primaryBusinessProcess}, '%')
AND b.`secondary_business_process` like CONCAT('%', #{secondaryBusinessProcess}, '%')
AND b.`information_sources` like CONCAT('%', #{informationSources}, '%')
) b ON a.auditModelNumber = b.auditModelNumber ) abc ORDER BY abc.detailed_time DESC
LIMIT like CONCAT('%', #{size}, '%') OFFSET like CONCAT('%', #{page}, '%')
) _abc left JOIN (SELECT * FROM `audit_elements_system` WHERE delete_status = '1') _def ON _abc.audit_model_number = _def.audit_model_number ORDER BY _abc.detailed_time DESC ) a

select * from ( SELECT _abc.dock_people AS dockPeople, _abc.dock_department AS dockDepartment, _abc.audit_point_number AS auditPointNumber , _abc.audit_point_name AS auditPointName, _abc.audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber, _abc.audit_model_name AS auditModelName, _abc.primary_business_process primaryBusinessProcess, _abc.secondary_business_process secondaryBusinessProcess, _abc.audit_business_logic auditBusinessLogic, _abc.expected_risks expectedRisks, _abc.expected_data_requirements expectedDataRequirements, _abc.expected_data_covers_unit_demand expectedDataCoversUnitDemand, _abc.requirements_involve_the_system requirementsInvolveTheSystem, _def.code_requirement as codeRequirement, _def.file_name AS fileName, _def.specification_requirement AS specificationRequirement, _def.reference_number AS referenceNumber, _def.dispatch_time AS dispatchTime, _def.start_time AS startTime, _def.end_time AS endTime, _def.standard_basis AS standardBasis, _abc.executionLogic as executionLogic, _abc.modelOwner AS modelOwner FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a.dockPeople as dock_people, a.auditPointNumber audit_point_number, a.auditPointName audit_point_name, a.auditModelNumber audit_model_number, a.auditModelName audit_model_name, a.typeOfInformation type_of_information, a.detailed_time detailed_time, a.dockDepartment dock_department, b.primaryBusinessProcess primary_business_process, b.secondaryBusinessProcess secondary_business_process, b.auditBusinessLogic audit_business_logic, b.expectedRisks expected_risks, b.expectedDataRequirements expected_data_requirements, b.expectedDataCoversUnitDemand expected_data_covers_unit_demand, b.requirementsInvolveTheSystem requirements_involve_the_system, b.isOnline as is_online, b.executionLogic as executionLogic, b.modelOwner as modelOwner FROM (SELECT a.`audit_point_number` AS auditPointNumber, a.`audit_point_name` AS auditPointName, a.`audit_model_number` AS auditModelNumber, a.`audit_model_name` AS auditModelName, a.`dock_people` AS dockPeople, a.type_of_information typeOfInformation, a.dock_department dockDepartment, a.detailed_time detailed_time FROM `audit_elements_operation_steps` a WHERE a.information_type = '审计模型设计' AND a.delete_status = '1' AND a.`is_import` like CONCAT('%', #{isImport}, '%') AND a.`dock_people` like CONCAT('%', #{dockPeople}, '%') AND a.`dock_department` LIKE like CONCAT('%', #{dockDepartment}, '%')
AND a.`audit_point_name` like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%')
AND a.`audit_point_number` LIKE '%' || like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNumber}, '%') || '%'
AND a.`audit_model_number` LIKE '%' || like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') || '%'
AND a.`audit_model_name` like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelName}, '%')
) a JOIN (SELECT b.`audit_model_number` AS auditModelNumber, b.`primary_business_process` AS primaryBusinessProcess, b.`secondary_business_process` AS secondaryBusinessProcess, b.`audit_business_logic` AS auditBusinessLogic, b.`expected_risks` AS expectedRisks, b.`expected_data_requirements` AS expectedDataRequirements, b.expected_data_covers_unit_demand AS expectedDataCoversUnitDemand, b.requirements_involve_the_system AS requirementsInvolveTheSystem, b.is_online AS isOnline, b.execution_logic AS executionLogic, c.model_owner as modelOwner FROM `audit_elements_info` b LEFT JOIN `spl_model_type` c ON b.`audit_model_number`=c.`audit_model_number` WHERE 1=1
and b.offline!='1'
AND b.`primary_business_process` = like CONCAT('%', #{primaryBusinessProcess}, '%')
AND b.`secondary_business_process` like CONCAT('%', #{secondaryBusinessProcess}, '%')
AND b.`information_sources` like CONCAT('%', #{informationSources}, '%')
) b ON a.auditModelNumber = b.auditModelNumber ) abc ORDER BY abc.detailed_time DESC
LIMIT like CONCAT('%', #{size}, '%') OFFSET like CONCAT('%', #{page}, '%')
) _abc left JOIN (SELECT * FROM `audit_elements_system` WHERE delete_status = '1') _def ON _abc.audit_model_number = _def.audit_model_number ORDER BY _abc.detailed_time DESC ) a

SELECT _abc.*, _def.code_requirement AS codeRequirement, _def.file_name AS fileName, _def.specification_requirement AS specificationRequirement, _def.reference_number AS referenceNumber, _def.dispatch_time AS dispatchTime, _def.start_time AS startTime, _def.end_time AS endTime FROM (SELECT a.dockPeople as dockPeople, a.auditPointNumber auditPointNumber, a.auditPointName auditPointName, a.auditModelNumber auditModelNumber, a.auditModelName auditModelName, b.primaryBusinessProcess primaryBusinessProcess, b.secondaryBusinessProcess secondaryBusinessProcess, b.auditBusinessLogic auditBusinessLogic, b.expectedRisks expectedRisks, b.expectedDataRequirements expectedDataRequirements, b.expectedDataCoversUnitDemand expectedDataCoversUnitDemand, b.requirementsInvolveTheSystem requirementsInvolveTheSystem FROM (SELECT a.`audit_point_number` AS auditPointNumber, a.`audit_point_name` AS auditPointName, a.`audit_model_number` AS auditModelNumber, a.`audit_model_name` AS auditModelName, a.`dock_people` AS dockPeople FROM `audit_elements_operation_steps` a WHERE a.information_type = '审计模型设计' AND a.delete_status = '1' AND a.`audit_model_number` like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') ) a JOIN (SELECT b. "audit_model_number" AS auditModelNumber, b.`primary_business_process` AS primaryBusinessProcess, b.`secondary_business_process` AS secondaryBusinessProcess, b.`audit_business_logic` AS auditBusinessLogic, b.`expected_risks` AS expectedRisks, b.`expected_data_requirements` AS expectedDataRequirements, b.expected_data_covers_unit_demand AS expectedDataCoversUnitDemand, b.requirements_involve_the_system AS requirementsInvolveTheSystem FROM `audit_elements_info` b WHERE 1=1 ) b ON a.auditModelNumber = b.auditModelNumber) _abc left JOIN (SELECT * FROM `audit_elements_system` WHERE delete_status = '1') _def ON _abc.auditModelNumber = _def.audit_model_number

SELECT count(*) _count FROM (SELECT a.dockPeople as dock_people, a.auditPointNumber audit_point_number, a.auditPointName audit_point_name, a.auditModelNumber audit_model_number, a.auditModelName audit_model_name, a.typeOfInformation typeOfInformation, b.primaryBusinessProcess primary_business_process, b.secondaryBusinessProcess secondary_business_process, b.auditBusinessLogic audit_business_logic, b.expectedRisks expected_risks, b.expectedDataRequirements expected_data_requirements, b.expectedDataCoversUnitDemand expected_data_covers_unit_demand, b.requirementsInvolveTheSystem requirements_involve_the_system FROM (SELECT a.`audit_point_number` AS auditPointNumber, a.`audit_point_name` AS auditPointName, a.`audit_model_number` AS auditModelNumber, a.`audit_model_name` AS auditModelName, a.`dock_people` AS dockPeople, a.type_of_information as typeOfInformation FROM `audit_elements_operation_steps` a WHERE a.information_type = '审计模型设计' AND a.delete_status = '1' AND a.`is_import` like CONCAT('%', #{isImport}, '%') AND a.`dock_people` like CONCAT('%', #{dockPeople}, '%') AND a.`dock_department` like like CONCAT('%', #{dockDepartment}, '%')
AND a.`audit_point_name` like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%')
AND a.`audit_point_number` LIKE '%' || like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNumber}, '%') || '%'
AND a.`audit_model_number` LIKE '%' || like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') || '%'
AND a.`audit_model_name` like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelName}, '%')
) a JOIN (SELECT b.`audit_model_number` AS auditModelNumber, b.`primary_business_process` AS primaryBusinessProcess, b.`secondary_business_process` AS secondaryBusinessProcess, b.`audit_business_logic` AS auditBusinessLogic, b.`expected_risks` AS expectedRisks, b.`expected_data_requirements` AS expectedDataRequirements, b.expected_data_covers_unit_demand AS expectedDataCoversUnitDemand, b.requirements_involve_the_system AS requirementsInvolveTheSystem FROM `audit_elements_info` b WHERE 1=1
and b.offline!='1'
AND b.`primary_business_process` = like CONCAT('%', #{primaryBusinessProcess}, '%')
AND b.`secondary_business_process` like CONCAT('%', #{secondaryBusinessProcess}, '%')
AND b.`information_sources` like CONCAT('%', #{informationSources}, '%')
) b ON a.auditModelNumber = b.auditModelNumber) _abc

SELECT CASE WHEN a.a = 0 AND b.b = 0 THEN '0' ELSE '1' END AS `modelNum` FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS `a` FROM audit_elements_operation_steps WHERE delete_status = 1 AND audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') AND audit_point_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNumber}, '%')) a LEFT JOIN (SELECT COUNT(*) AS `b` FROM audit_elements_info WHERE audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') AND audit_point_number like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNumber}, '%')) b ON 1 = 1

SELECT DISTINCT SYS_UNIQUE_CODE "id", SYS_NAME AS `name` FROM hpbus.system_audit_50001_newdate WHERE 1 = 1 AND `statis_ym` = ( SELECT DISTINCT MAX ( "statis_ym" ) FROM hpbus.system_audit_50001_newdate )
and "prov_name" like like CONCAT('%', #{dockDepartment}, '%') or "prov_name" like '%集团%'

SELECT SEND_FILE_NAME AS `fileName`, SYS_FIELD_TYP AS `specificationRequirement`, SEND_FILE_UNIQUE_CODE AS `referenceNumber`, PRINT_TM AS `dispatchTime`, PRINT_TM AS `startTime`, END_TM AS `endTime` FROM hpbus.system_audit_50001_newdate WHERE SYS_UNIQUE_CODE like CONCAT('%', #{codeRequirementId}, '%') order by statis_ym desc limit 1
